description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) in autonomous mode was westbound on 16th Street in the right-turn-only lane, towards Bryant Street in San 
Francisco. The Zoox vehicle operator disengaged from autonomous mode and continued in manual mode when they encountered a stopped 
bus in the lane. The Zoox vehicle operator gradually brought the vehicle to a stop behind the bus. A few seconds later, an e-bicyclist, riding 
on westbound 16th Street, approached the stopped Zoox vehicle from the rear and made contact with the rear bumper. The e-bicyclist then 
left the scene without exchanging information. The rear bumper of the Zoox vehicle sustained minor damage. There were no reported 
injuries, and the police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
